title: Admissions
overview: Students can apply through the university admission portal or admissions office during the announced admission cycle.
process: Upload scanned copies of required documents.
Pay the application processing fee through the listed payment method.
Appear for an admission test or interview if the selected program requires it.
Check the merit list and complete enrollment within the deadline.
required_documents: Previous degree or transcript for graduate programs
Domicile certificate if required by the university
eligibility: Eligibility depends on the selected program. Undergraduate applicants usually need intermediate or equivalent education. Graduate applicants usually need a relevant bachelor's degree.
contact: For final deadlines, merit criteria, and program-specific requirements, contact the admissions office.
